problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: If Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing is applied to in, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
